name: Tomatillo-Papaya Sauce
recipeInstructions:
From Casa Madrona Restaurant in Sausalito, Calif.
1. Simmer the tomatillos in the chicken stock until they are tender.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon safflower oil in a pan. Add the chopped cilantro and green onion tops. Saute briefly until fragrant.
3. Transfer all ingredients to a blender and puree until smooth.
4. Strain the sauce through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
5. Season with lime juice, salt, and pepper to taste.
6. Serve with chicken or seafood. Serves 4.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 78.9 calories; 3.6 grams total fat; (0.4 grams saturated fat); 0.9 grams protein; 10 grams carbohydrates; 0.1 milligrams cholesterol; 132.5 milligrams sodium.
